name: Constant Interest Rate Election for Short-Term Obligations

eligibility.description: Applies to obligations of the U.S. or its possessions/states with a maturity of 1 year or less.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to determine the ratable share of acquisition discount on short-term government obligations using a constant interest rate instead of a daily linear ratable share.
